hero.title: What I notice, living it.
hero.subtitle: Notes on what I observe and the questions that emerge.
home.heroMicro: Updated when there is something worth saying.
home.authorIntro: I work with data and design by day. The rest of the time, I pay attention to what goes on under the surface — in people, in patterns, in the things we take for granted. This is where I write about it.
writing.title: Writing
writing.description: On what I notice, what I remember, and what won't leave me alone.
themes.title: Threads
themes.description: Short thoughts, reading notes, and daily observations.
about.bio1: My day job involves data and consulting. But what I keep coming back to is the other side of things — what goes on beneath decisions, beneath patterns, beneath the stories we tell ourselves without noticing.
about.bio2: I'm drawn to the kind of thinking that doesn't announce itself — growing quietly outside the noise, taking on different shapes. The questions that interest me most have no absolute answers: how we become more "ourselves," how we find what truly matters, how we walk alongside problems that seem unsolvable on the surface.
about.whatIWriteBody: This site is where I record my thinking and learning. I write about what I see as I move through the world — what hides beneath everyday life, what settles after the obvious falls away. If there's a thread, it's finding patterns and through-lines in all the noise.
about.quote: I'd rather be someone who approaches essence from different angles than someone known for being interesting. I hope my writing offers enough insight that what I see and think along the way can be shared with the world.
subscribe.title: If you'd like
subscribe.description: I write from time to time. You might want to see it.
subscribe.subscribed: Thank you. Check your email for a welcome note.

subscribe.unsubscribed: You've been removed from the list. No more emails.
subscribe.invalidToken: This link is no longer valid. You're welcome to subscribe again if you'd like.
subscribe.pageDescription: When there's something new, I'll send a short note. That's all.

articleBottom.subscribeDescription: You're welcome to leave your email. I'll write when there's something to share.

contact.error: That didn't go through. Would you try again?

support.title: Support This Writing
support.description: This site has no ads, no sponsors, and no paywalls. If the writing has meant something to you and you'd like to help it continue, I'm grateful.
support.whyBody: Everything here is written and maintained by one person. Your support covers hosting and the time it takes to think and write carefully. That's all it goes toward.
support.internationalDescription: Credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay — any amount you'd like.
support.chinaDescription: Use the Alipay app to scan the QR code below.
support.compactTitle: If this piece stayed with you
support.compactBody: If something here resonated with you, you can support this space in a small way. There's no obligation — just a quiet gesture to help the writing continue.
support.thankYouBody: Thank you. It means more than I can say easily.
about.connectDescription: If any of this resonates, there are a few ways to connect.
about.getInTouchDesc: I'd be glad to hear from you.
about.supportWorkDesc: If you'd like to help this site stay independent.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: By using this site or making a payment, you agree to the following terms.
terms.serviceBody: This website is a personal blog offering written content. Some content is freely available; some features (such as subscriptions or one-time support payments) are processed through third-party services.
terms.userBody: You agree to use this site in good faith, provide accurate information when subscribing or making a payment, and not to misuse or attempt to disrupt the service.
terms.paymentsBody: All payments are processed securely by Stripe. By making a payment, you agree to Stripe's terms of service. Support contributions are voluntary and non-refundable unless required by applicable law. Recurring subscriptions can be cancelled at any time.
terms.contentBody: All written content, design, and original materials on this site are the property of the author. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without permission.
terms.liabilityBody: This site is provided as-is. The author makes no warranties regarding availability, accuracy, or fitness for any purpose. To the fullest extent permitted by law, the author is not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of this site.
terms.changesBody: These terms may be updated from time to time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of any changes.
terms.contactBody: If you have questions about these terms, please reach out via the contact page.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How your information is collected, used, and protected on this site.
privacy.collectBody: When you subscribe or make a payment, we collect your email address and, in the case of payments, your name and payment details (processed by Stripe — we do not store card numbers). We also collect standard analytics data such as page views and referrers.
privacy.useBody: Your email is used solely to send you occasional updates about new writing. Payment information is used to process your transaction. Analytics help us understand which content resonates.
privacy.thirdPartyBody: This site uses the following third-party services that may process your data: Stripe (payment processing), Supabase (database and authentication), and Vercel (hosting and analytics). Each operates under their own privacy policies.
privacy.cookiesBody: This site uses minimal cookies necessary for functionality (such as session management and language preference). We do not use advertising or tracking cookies.
privacy.rightsBody: You may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your personal data at any time by contacting us. You can unsubscribe from emails using the link in any email.
privacy.retentionBody: We retain your data only as long as necessary to provide the service. If you unsubscribe or request deletion, your data will be removed promptly.
privacy.contactBody: For any privacy-related questions, please reach out via the contact page.
